---
title: "FWCP Peace — Climate Departure by Ecoregion"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    number_sections: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5,
  message = FALSE, warning = FALSE
)
```

```{r libs, include = FALSE}
library(cd)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyterra)
library(dplyr)
```

This document walks the same pipeline as the `peace-fwcp` vignette but
runs it once per BC ecoregion intersecting the FWCP Peace Region. The
output is exploratory — gitignored — and is meant to surface which
ecoregions show the largest departures and which look mellow.

## Setup

```{r load-data}
aoi <- st_read(
  system.file("extdata", "example_aoi_fwcp_peace.gpkg", package = "cd"),
  quiet = TRUE
)
aoi_bb <- st_bbox(aoi)

ctx <- system.file("extdata", "context_fwcp_peace.gpkg", package = "cd")
towns      <- st_read(ctx, layer = "towns",      quiet = TRUE)
lakes      <- st_read(ctx, layer = "lakes",      quiet = TRUE)
highways   <- st_read(ctx, layer = "highways",   quiet = TRUE)
ecoregions <- st_read(ctx, layer = "ecoregions", quiet = TRUE)
ecoregions <- ecoregions[ecoregions$area_km2 > 100, ]
ecoregions <- ecoregions[order(-ecoregions$area_km2), ]
```

```{r catalog}
catalog <- cd_catalog()
```

## Compute per-ecoregion results

```{r per-ecoregion-compute}
results <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(ecoregions)), function(i) {
  er <- ecoregions[i, ]
  ts <- cd_extract(catalog, er)
  bl <- cd_baseline(ts, baseline_years = 1951:1980)
  ano <- cd_anomaly(ts, bl)
  trn <- cd_trend(ano, trend_start = c(1951, 1981))
  cmp <- cd_compare(ts, window_a = 2015:2025, window_b = 1951:1980,
                    method = "mean_diff")
  cmp_pct <- cd_compare(
    ts[ts$variable %in% c("prcp", "soil_moisture"), ],
    window_a = 2015:2025, window_b = 1951:1980, method = "pct_change"
  )
  list(ts = ts, bl = bl, ano = ano, trn = trn, cmp = cmp, cmp_pct = cmp_pct)
})
names(results) <- ecoregions$code
```

# Per-ecoregion sections

```{r child-sections, results='asis'}
out <- vector("list", nrow(ecoregions))
for (i in seq_len(nrow(ecoregions))) {
  er <- ecoregions[i, ]
  res <- results[[i]]
  out[[i]] <- knitr::knit_child(
    "_peace_ecoregion_section.Rmd",
    envir = environment(),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
}
cat(unlist(out), sep = "\n")
```

# Roll-up

```{r rollup}
rollup <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(ecoregions)), function(i) {
  res <- results[[i]]
  trn_ann <- res$trn[res$trn$period == "annual" & res$trn$trend_start == 1951, ]
  cmp_pct <- res$cmp_pct
  data.frame(
    code = ecoregions$code[i],
    name = ecoregions$name[i],
    area_km2 = round(ecoregions$area_km2[i]),
    tmean_slope_per_decade = round(
      10 * trn_ann$slope[trn_ann$variable == "tmean"], 3
    ),
    tmean_pvalue = round(
      trn_ann$mk_pvalue[trn_ann$variable == "tmean"], 3
    ),
    prcp_pct_change = round(
      cmp_pct$difference[cmp_pct$variable == "prcp"
                         & cmp_pct$period == "annual"], 1
    ),
    sm_pct_change = round(
      cmp_pct$difference[cmp_pct$variable == "soil_moisture"
                         & cmp_pct$period == "annual"], 1
    )
  )
}))
rollup <- rollup[order(-rollup$tmean_slope_per_decade), ]
knitr::kable(rollup, row.names = FALSE,
  caption = "Per-ecoregion roll-up: annual tmean trend (degC/decade since 1951), Mann-Kendall p-value, and recent-vs-pre-warming percent change for prcp and soil moisture. Sorted by tmean trend slope.")
```
